description_long: This is a heavily armored tracked combat vehicle with a large, protruding main cannon mounted on a rotating turret. The body is robust and angular, featuring visible mechanical components such as gears, hatches, and reinforced panels, all rendered in a yellowish, weathered finish. The vehicle rides on wide, rugged tracks designed for traversing rough terrain, with detailed treads and suspension elements visible along the sides. The turret is equipped with various mechanical details, including what appears to be a targeting device and additional structural reinforcements. The surface is adorned with a mottled, camouflage-like paint scheme, giving it a battle-worn appearance. No visible military insignia or unit markings are present, and the vehicle lacks traditional tires, relying instead on its continuous track system.
description: A yellow, heavily armored tracked combat vehicle with a large main cannon and detailed mechanical features, finished in a mottled camouflage pattern.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the cannon, detailed tracks, and exposed mechanical components on the turret and hull.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide tracks, central cannon barrel, and reinforced frontal armor with visible hatches and mechanical details.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the cannon, tracks, and additional mechanical elements, mirroring the first side but with subtle differences in surface details.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the turret, rear armor plating, and the ends of the tracks, with a visible hatch and mechanical wheel.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large cannon mounted on the central turret; no additional weapon mounts visible.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body armor plating with reinforced, angular panels covering the hull and turret; thickness appears substantial, with sloped surfaces for deflection.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Mottled yellow and green camouflage pattern with irregular, organic shapes and a weathered finish.
